tools.name: ask
tools.description: Ask the agent a question. Routes through the full agent pipeline: reads schema docs, selects and runs queries, analyzes results, and returns a complete answer. Synchronous when the agent finishes within deadline; returns {status:'pending', job_id:...} otherwise so the caller can poll request_status

tools.name: help
tools.description: Short orientation text for apples MCP callers.

tools.name: read_response
tools.description: Stream a chunk of a pending ask() job's output.

tools.name: request_status
tools.description: Check the status of a pending ask() job.
